context: 2015 saw global EDM and pop crossovers dominate the French singles chart, with tropical house and dance tracks from Omi, Major Lazer, and Feder leading the year-end tally. French artists made their presence felt through rising pop star Marina Kaye, Feder's Strasbourg-born production, and Louane's breakout from 'The Voice France' and the César-winning film 'La Famille Bélier'. Streaming began to reshape how chart points were calculated in France.

tracks.title: Lean On
tracks.artist: Major Lazer feat. DJ Snake & MØ
